steps.title: Set up slope formula with the intercept points
steps.content:
The slope formula is $m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$. We have two points: the x-intercept $(-5, 0)$ and the y-intercept $(0, \frac{95}{4})$.

Substituting into the formula:
$$m = \frac{\frac{95}{4} - 0}{0 - (-5)} = \frac{\frac{95}{4}}{5}$$

steps.title: Simplify the complex fraction
steps.content:
Dividing by 5 is the same as multiplying by $\frac{1}{5}$:
$$m = \frac{95}{4} \cdot \frac{1}{5} = \frac{95}{20}=\frac{19}{4}.$$ That matches Choice C — $\frac{19}{4}$.
